response.justification: Strong senior engineer with proven ability to design and maintain large-scale systems and excellent software craftsmanship ethos, but critically lacks required Java and Kotlin expertise and has zero Spring/enterprise framework experience. Most recent meaningful Java work was 2014-2015. Current focus on TypeScript/Node.js and AI infrastructure diverges significantly from JVM tooling requirements. Would require substantial ramp-up on core technologies.
strengths: Extensive experience designing and maintaining large-scale systems at scale (Stripe, Shopify, Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second)
Strong software craftsmanship and architectural thinking with demonstrated ability to drive code quality and testing standards
Past IDE/tooling development experience at National Instruments, plus current developer tooling work at Stripe
concerns: Minimal Java/Kotlin expertise with no recent deep work—last Java mention was 2014-2015 at National Instruments
Zero demonstrated experience with Spring ecosystem, Quarkus, Hibernate, or other enterprise frameworks core to the role
Current technical stack (TypeScript, Node.js, AI infrastructure) diverges significantly from JVM tooling; would need substantial retraining

key_factors.factor: Strong large-scale systems and architecture background
